description_short: Experience the silky smoothness of our sateen duvet cover, designed with a sleek zipper closure.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash delicate cycle, cold water, mild detergent. No bleach/softeners. Air-dry.
cover_fabric.closure: Zipper closure with internal corner ties

proprietary_tech.name: Zipper + Corner Ties
proprietary_tech.description: Zipper secures duvet, internal ties prevent shifting/bunching.

faq_specs.question: What does 300 thread count mean in this duvet cover?
faq_specs.answer: A 300 thread count refers to the number of threads woven per square inch, offering an ideal balance of softness, strength, and breathability.

faq_specs.question: How does the zipper closure and corner ties help?
faq_specs.answer: The zipper closure keeps your duvet securely enclosed, while the corner ties hold it in place, preventing shifting or bunching inside the cover.

notes_observed: Only Single price visible (₹2294). Available in Single/Double only — no Queen/King for duvet covers.
